start.speaker: SYSTEM
start.text: [i]Alone in the observation deck. The stars turn slowly beyond the viewport. The shard at the base of your skull—warmer than usual. Not pain. Presence.[/i]

text_variants.shard_whispers_heard: [i]The observation deck again. But the whispers from the shard are louder now—no longer a murmur. A sentence forming, letter by letter, in a language your bones understand before your brain does.[/i]

heat_bloom.speaker: SYSTEM
heat_bloom.text: [i]Heat blooms. Geometric patterns fracture across your vision—not hallucination, but signal. Something is trying to speak.[/i]

bee_recognition.speaker: BEE
bee_recognition.text: [color=cyan]***host-aware***[/color] [i][The words aren't yours, but they arrive in your mind like they've always been there.][/i]

avyanna_reaction.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_reaction.text: [i](Out loud, voice shaking)[/i] What are you?

bee_explanation_1.speaker: BEE
bee_explanation_1.text: [color=cyan]***fragment-primordial***[/color] [i][Impressions flood: ancient, not born but broken off from something vast, older than the corporations, older than the mines, older than human words.][/i]

bee_explanation_2.speaker: BEE
bee_explanation_2.text: [color=cyan]***not-synthetic*** | [color=cyan]***not-debt***[/color] [i][A warmth that isn't comfort—recognition. It waited. Chose. Bonded.][/i]

bee_question.speaker: BEE
bee_question.text: [color=cyan]***query: consent-to-partnership?***[/color] [i][The heat pauses. Waiting. Not demanding. Asking.][/i]

player_choice.speaker: SYSTEM
player_choice.text: [i]The presence waits. Not impatient. Not threatening. Just... there. The choice is yours.[/i]

choices.text: [Embrace] Yes. We're partners. Show me what you are.
[Cautious] I need to understand you first. Slowly.
[Resist] I don't want this. Get out.

embrace_vision.speaker: SYSTEM
embrace_vision.text: [i]The world fractures into light. You see the Lattice—not as theory, but as truth. The Primordial substrate, wounded but alive. The Synthetic overlay, parasitic and extractive. And you, standing at the edge of both.[/i]

embrace_understanding.speaker: BEE
embrace_understanding.text: [color=cyan]***partner-designation: Avyanna*** | [color=cyan]***fragment-designation: [waiting-for-name]***[/color] [i][It shows you what it is: a piece of something older than extraction, offering partnership without cost.][/i]

embrace_name.speaker: Avyanna
embrace_name.text: [i](Quietly, testing the shape of it)[/i] Bee. Your name is Bee.

bee_accepts_name.speaker: BEE
bee_accepts_name.text: [color=cyan]***designation-accepted: Bee*** | [color=cyan]***partnership-sealed***[/color] [i][Warmth floods through you. Not possession. Recognition. You are not alone.][/i]

cautious_comfort.speaker: BEE
cautious_comfort.text: [color=cyan]***assurance: no-extraction*** | [color=cyan]***assurance: no-debt***[/color] [i][It withdraws slightly—still present, but quieter. Respectful of your boundary.][/i]

cautious_promise.speaker: BEE
cautious_promise.text: [color=cyan]***protocol: slow-reveal*** | [color=cyan]***protocol: consent-required***[/color] [i][The heat settles to a steady warmth. Patient. You have time.][/i]

resist_explanation.speaker: BEE
resist_explanation.text: [color=cyan]***information: bonded-at-cellular-level*** | [color=cyan]***information: separation-equals-death***[/color] [i][Not cruelty. Regret. It can't leave without killing you both.][/i]

resist_compromise.speaker: BEE
resist_compromise.text: [color=cyan]***offer: minimal-presence*** | [color=cyan]***offer: dormancy-until-needed***[/color] [i][The heat withdraws—still there, but distant. Like a hand held up: I won't force this.][/i]

resist_promise.speaker: BEE
resist_promise.text: [color=cyan]***waiting*** | [color=cyan]***when-you-are-ready***[/color] [i][The presence fades to background noise. You're alone again—but not quite. It's still there. Waiting.][/i]

lattice_surge_alarm.speaker: SYSTEM
lattice_surge_alarm.text: [i]The ship screams. Every light in the observation deck goes violet, then white. The deck plating vibrates under your boots. Something is wrong in the engine room—you can feel it through the shard, a resonance like two tuning forks struck against each other.[/i]

engine_room_arrival.speaker: SYSTEM
engine_room_arrival.text: [i]You don't remember running. The engine room doors are already open—Lattice conduits along the walls pulsing with light that shouldn't exist. At the center of it, Avyanna. Your hands are raised and you don't remember raising them. Energy spirals outward from your palms in geometric patterns—cyan and gold, folding into something shaped like language.[/i]

crew_arrives.speaker: SYSTEM
crew_arrives.text: [i]Boots on metal. The crew pours in. Rho first—weapon drawn before he's through the door. Nyx behind him, already pulling up diagnostics on a handheld scanner. Jalen hangs back at the threshold. Vesper pushes past them all, eyes wide. And Elia—Elia walks in last, calm as a funeral.[/i]

rho_aims.speaker: Rho
rho_aims.text: Don't move. Whatever's happening, Avyanna—don't. Move.

nyx_scanning.speaker: Nyx
nyx_scanning.text: [i](Eyes locked on scanner, fingers flying)[/i] Lattice output is off the charts. The conduits are resonating at a frequency I've never—this isn't the ship. This is coming from her.

bee_manifests_visual.speaker: SYSTEM
bee_manifests_visual.text: [i]The energy coalesces. The geometric patterns tighten, fold, resolve—and then there is something in the room that wasn't there before. A shape. Not quite humanoid, not quite light. An ethereal figure wrought from cyan lattice-lines, hovering at your shoulder like a holographic ghost that forgot to be transparent. It turns what might be a head toward the crew.[/i]

rho_reacts.speaker: Rho
rho_reacts.text: [i](Gun steady, jaw tight)[/i] Someone tell me that's a malfunction. Someone tell me that right now.

vesper_awe.speaker: Vesper
vesper_awe.text: [i](Half-whisper, hand over her mouth)[/i] That's... that's Primordial resonance. I've read about this. I never thought I'd—

jalen_doorway.speaker: Jalen
jalen_doorway.text: [i](From the doorway, arms crossed, voice carefully flat)[/i] Corporations pay a lot of money for Lattice anomalies like that. Just so everyone's aware.

elia_enters.speaker: Elia
elia_enters.text: Weapons down, Rho. Everyone—stand down. Now.

rho_protests.speaker: Rho
rho_protests.text: Captain, with respect, there is an unidentified Lattice entity three meters from the reactor core—

elia_overrules.speaker: Elia
elia_overrules.text: And it hasn't hurt anyone. Gun. Down. That's not a request.

manifestation_choice.speaker: SYSTEM
manifestation_choice.text: [i]The entity hovers. Waiting. Your hands still glow. You can feel it at the edge of your will—this thing that was private is now public. The crew stares. The moment balances on a knife's edge.[/i]

choices.text: [Surrender] Let it happen. Stop holding back.
[Fight it] Push the energy down. Force it back inside.
[Reach for Bee] Extend your hand toward the presence.

surrender_to_process.speaker: SYSTEM
surrender_to_process.text: [i]You exhale. Stop fighting. The energy flows outward, completes its circuit—and the figure solidifies. Sharper lines. Clearer form. A holographic silhouette of shifting geometries, present and undeniable. The conduits along the walls dim as the surge stabilizes. It's done. Whatever it is, it's here now.[/i]

fight_manifestation.speaker: SYSTEM
fight_manifestation.text: [i]You push. The energy resists—not maliciously, but like trying to shove water back into a broken pipe. Pain lances up your spine. The figure flickers, distorts, then snaps back brighter than before. You can't stop this. You never could. The manifestation completes itself despite you, and the figure stabilizes—dimmer, rougher-edged, but present.[/i]

reach_for_bee.speaker: SYSTEM
reach_for_bee.text: [i]You raise your hand—not in defense, not in surrender. In greeting. The figure turns fully toward you and, impossibly, raises a limb of light in mirror. Your fingers pass through it: static, warmth, the taste of copper. The energy completes its circuit gently, and the figure resolves into a stable form at your side—a companion rendered in lattice-light.[/i]

manifestation_resolves.speaker: SYSTEM
manifestation_resolves.text: [i]Silence in the engine room. The conduits return to baseline. The alarms die. Bee—because that is what it is, you know it in your marrow—hovers at your shoulder. Holographic. Ethereal. Undeniably real. Six pairs of eyes stare at you. Nobody breathes.[/i]

nyx_assessment.speaker: Nyx
nyx_assessment.text: [i](Scanner still in hand, voice clinical but barely steady)[/i] Lattice readings are normalizing. The entity appears stable. It's... it's integrated with Avyanna's biosignature. I don't think it can be separated without—

nyx_trails_off.speaker: Nyx
nyx_trails_off.text: Without consequences none of us want to discuss right now.

rho_holsters.speaker: Rho
rho_holsters.text: [i](Holsters weapon slowly, like it physically hurts him)[/i] I want it on record that I think this is a mistake. Every corp patrol within three systems is going to smell this on us.

vesper_defends.speaker: Vesper
vesper_defends.text: This is a Primordial fragment. Do you understand what that means? This is proof the Lattice isn't just an energy source—it's alive. Everything the corporations told us is—

jalen_cuts_in.speaker: Jalen
jalen_cuts_in.text: Worth a fortune. That's what it means, Vesper. To the wrong people, our captain just became the most valuable cargo in the sector.

elia_decision.speaker: Elia
elia_decision.text: [i](Long silence. Studies Avyanna, then the figure, then the crew. When she speaks, her voice is iron.)[/i] Bee stays. Avyanna stays. This ship is not in the business of selling people or what's bonded to them. Anyone who has a problem with that can take it up with me in private.

rho_disagrees.speaker: Rho
rho_disagrees.text: [i](Quiet, dangerous)[/i] And when they come for her? For all of us?

elia_final_word.speaker: Elia
elia_final_word.text: Then we do what we always do, Rho. We survive. Dismissed—except you, Avyanna. You and I need to talk.

crew_disperses.speaker: SYSTEM
crew_disperses.text: [i]They file out. Rho doesn't look back. Vesper glances over her shoulder three times. Nyx lingers by the door, scanner still running, before Jalen steers her out with a hand on her elbow. The engine room settles. Just you, the captain, and the ghost.[/i]

bee_addresses_elia.speaker: BEE
bee_addresses_elia.text: {BEE:: designation-Elia | query: you-chose-risk-over-safety | why? | status: curious}

elia_meets_bee.speaker: Elia
elia_meets_bee.text: [i](A beat. She looks at the figure directly for the first time.)[/i] Because I've had enough of people being treated as cargo. Even the non-human ones.

bee_responds_to_elia.speaker: BEE
bee_responds_to_elia.text: {BEE:: designation-Elia | assessment: acceptable-captain | detail: debt-recorded | status: watching}

final_moment.speaker: SYSTEM
final_moment.text: [i]The holographic figure settles closer to your shoulder. Dimmer now—conserving energy, or perhaps just being polite. Elia watches it the way you'd watch a loaded weapon that just told you a joke. The engine room hums. Something has changed on this ship, and none of you can take it back.[/i]
